title: Aevum - Basepack
description: A NeoForge pack containing optimization mods that I use as a base for my actual modpacks.
body:
Hello there o/

I've been creating a lot of modpacks of my own for fun, but after going through the process of choosing mods a dozen times, I realized that it would be so much easier to have a base pack that contains optimization mods that I could build on top of. I'm tired of having to remember these mods every time. After making that base, I thought that it could benefit other people too, so I've decided to share it. I know that it's probably not the most optimized pack out there, but it's a good enough base for me (and maybe for you).

---
